description: You are a specification writer at Meyer & Lin Architects. Draft the specification section '09 30 13 - Ceramic Tiling' for the Harborview Medical Center Expansion project using the data from /home/ga/Documents/spec_data.json. The document must follow the 3-Part CSI MasterFormat (PART 1 - GENERAL, PART 2 - PRODUCTS, PART 3 - EXECUTION) with appropriate heading levels for parts and articles. Include a page header with 'PROJECT: Harborview Medical Center Expansion' (Left) and 'SECTION 09 30 13' (Right), and page numbers in the footer. Part 2 must specify materials (Tile T-1, Tile T-2, Mortar, and Grout) based on the JSON data. Part 3 must include a Tile Schedule table listing Mark, Material, Finish, Size, and Location for T-1 and T-2. Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/093013_Ceramic_Tiling.odt.
